raw_forms: Likert scales, open responses, motivation/SRL/usability items
analysis_families: descriptive, factor analysis, reliability, regression, mixed methods
minimum_validity_checks: scale meaning, reliability, sampling, response bias, missingness
research_genres: survey study, perception-outcome study, instrument validation

raw_forms: scores, item responses, rubrics, mastery labels, grades
analysis_families: IRT/Rasch, CDM, reliability, regression, knowledge tracing
common_overclaim: treating scores as construct truth without validity evidence
minimum_validity_checks: scoring rules, reliability, construct alignment, timing, scale invariance
research_genres: measurement paper, learning outcome study, adaptive assessment

raw_forms: LMS logs, clicks, page views, attempts, dwell time
good_for: platform behavior, participation, timing, tool use
analysis_families: descriptive analytics, dashboards, ML, survival/time-to-event, process mining
common_overclaim: claiming cognition or engagement directly from clicks
minimum_validity_checks: event definitions, missing events, timestamp quality, platform affordances
research_genres: learning analytics dashboard, early-alert model, behavior study

raw_forms: ordered events, turns, coded actions, transitions, pathways
good_for: temporal order, pathways, strategies, state transitions
analysis_families: sequence mining, TNA, ONA, ENA, process mining, Markov/HMM
common_overclaim: flattening events then making process claims
minimum_validity_checks: event boundaries, ordering, unit of analysis, windowing, code stability
research_genres: process analytics, learning pathway study, strategy comparison

raw_forms: essays, reflections, prompts, feedback, short answers
good_for: meaning, argumentation, feedback, concepts, writing quality
analysis_families: qualitative coding, NLP, topic modeling, embeddings, classification, LLM-assisted coding
common_overclaim: using automated labels as verified constructs
minimum_validity_checks: annotation quality, model validation, language/context fit, human audit

raw_forms: discussion posts, chat, talk turns, replies, argument moves
analysis_families: discourse analysis, content analysis, visual analytics, NLP, ENA/ONA
minimum_validity_checks: segmentation, speaker roles, coding framework, temporal context
research_genres: CSCL discourse study, collaborative learning analytics

raw_forms: reply networks, peer ties, co-editing, co-presence, group membership
good_for: interaction structure, centrality, brokerage, participation patterns
analysis_families: SNA, two-mode networks, ERGM, community detection, epistemic networks
common_overclaim: treating centrality as learning quality by itself
minimum_validity_checks: tie definition, direction/weight, missing actors, network boundary
research_genres: social learning analytics, CSCL network study

raw_forms: classroom video, screen capture, speech, gesture, embodied action
good_for: context, embodiment, interactional meaning, classroom practice
analysis_families: interaction analysis, multimodal coding, speech/NLP, microgenetic analysis
common_overclaim: generalizing from selected rich episodes without sampling logic
minimum_validity_checks: camera coverage, transcript quality, episode selection, coder agreement
research_genres: video interaction study, classroom learning sciences paper

raw_forms: eye gaze, posture, facial expression, physiological signals, spatial trails
unit_of_analysis: signal window, synchronized event, learner state
good_for: attention proxies, arousal, coordination, embodied learning
analysis_families: feature extraction, multimodal fusion, ML, time-series analysis
common_overclaim: treating sensor signals as direct emotion or cognition
minimum_validity_checks: calibration, synchronization, noise, construct mapping, missing streams

raw_forms: code, drawings, models, game artifacts, design documents
good_for: learning products, design choices, competence evidence
analysis_families: rubric scoring, qualitative artifact analysis, code metrics, portfolio analytics
common_overclaim: inferring process from final artifact alone
minimum_validity_checks: rubric alignment, task constraints, revision history, scorer reliability
research_genres: design-based research, constructionist learning, portfolio assessment

raw_forms: condition labels, pre/post, fidelity logs, treatment exposure
good_for: effects under design assumptions, implementation variation
analysis_families: RCT, QED, RD, ITS, SCED, DiD, causal forests where warranted
common_overclaim: causal language from convenience pre/post data
minimum_validity_checks: assignment, baseline equivalence, attrition, fidelity, contamination

raw_forms: enrollment, demographics, course history, advising, retention
good_for: equity patterns, persistence, course pathways, institutional risk
analysis_families: descriptive, multilevel models, survival analysis, predictive analytics, fairness audit
common_overclaim: deficit framing or unsupported individual diagnosis
minimum_validity_checks: data governance, population definition, subgroup validity, fairness, privacy
